title: Berlin → Palma de Mallorca (Port de Sóller) | Jul 15–25, 2026

slots.name: Breakfast
slots.description: Easy start near the hotel.

slots.name: Transfer: Port de Sóller → hotel check-in
slots.description: Light reset after flight; airport→Port de Sóller transfer (taxi/transfer bus).
slots.notes: If you arrive earlier, adjust this slot later.

slots.name: Check-in + unpack
slots.description: Boutique-hotel check-in, cool down, plan the week.

slots.name: Sea lounge (Cala entrance/nearby cove)
slots.description: Start with the closest calm swimming spot; keep it relaxed.

slots.name: Lunch (local seafood / tapas)
slots.description: Mallorcan-style seafood, ensaimada for later if time.
slots.notes: Aim for casual, high-quality local spots.

slots.name: Sunset stroll along the harbor
slots.description: Walk off the travel; capture views over the bay.

slots.name: Dinner (Focaccia/pa amb oli + seafood)
slots.description: Dinner at a local restaurant near the harbor.
slots.notes: Reserve if possible during peak season.

slots.name: Breakfast
slots.description: Coffee + pastries before the beach.

slots.name: Hidden beach cove #1 (short walk)
slots.description: Choose a quieter cove reachable by short steps/footpath; swim + read.

slots.name: Late lunch (fresh fish / grilled prawns)
slots.description: Long, slow lunch; order seasonal seafood.

slots.name: Lounge + shade time
slots.description: Return to the water for a final swim; minimal walking.

slots.name: Dinner (Mallorcan classics)
slots.description: Try caldereta de langosta or arroz brut; finish with crema catalana.

slots.name: Optional: drinks at golden hour
slots.description: If you still have energy, a low-key drink.

slots.name: Breakfast
slots.description: Slow morning at the terrace.

slots.name: Train/ride into Sóller + stroll
slots.description: Wander the historic center, streets, and small squares; light shopping only.

slots.name: Lunch (local cuisine focused)
slots.description: Order 2–3 sharing plates (sobrasada, tumbet, seafood fideuà).

slots.name: Return to Port de Sóller: sea lounge
slots.description: Beach time; minimal commitments.

slots.name: Dinner (wine + tapas)
slots.description: Quality tapas/wine in Port de Sóller; keep it unhurried.

days.label: Tramuntana light hike (start with easy path)

slots.name: Breakfast
slots.description: Early-ish start to beat heat.

slots.name: Light Tramuntana hike: Sóller → Biniaraix (easy coastal-valley)
slots.description: Summer-friendly loop: start near Sóller valley, follow shaded paths; plan a short turn-around if hot. Duration ~2.5–3h, modest elevation.

slots.name: Cool-down lunch (salads + grilled seafood)
slots.description: Hydrate; eat light but satisfying.

slots.name: Siesta / hotel downtime
slots.description: Rest the legs; shower + recovery.

slots.name: Beach lounge + swim
slots.description: Short walk back to the water; sunset-friendly swimming.

slots.name: Dinner (local paella/fideuà)
slots.description: Pick one house specialty; ask for seasonal fish.

slots.name: Breakfast
slots.description: Start relaxed; sunscreen + water for the hike-beach mix.

slots.name: Hidden beach cove #2 (easy walk)
slots.description: A less-crowded cove; towel up, swim, and keep moving slowly.

slots.name: Lunch (market-style / tapas)
slots.description: Sharing plates; aim for local produce + seafood.

slots.name: Boat/shore stroll + photo time
slots.description: Low-effort scenic time around the harbor.

slots.name: Dinner (chef’s special / wine pairing)
slots.description: A more “special” dinner night within budget; reserve if possible.

slots.name: Breakfast
slots.description: Grab-and-go if you want an early start.

slots.name: Day trip: Tramuntana viewpoint loop (light)
slots.description: Drive or bus to viewpoints; do a short out-and-back walk for shade + photos.
slots.notes: Choose short segments; avoid long climbs in peak sun.

slots.name: Lunch (Valldemossa / Deià style stop)
slots.description: Local dishes in a scenic village; go for seasonal fish or lamb.

slots.name: Late afternoon: return to sea + swim
slots.description: Back to Port de Sóller for a calm swim and rest.

slots.name: Dinner (wine + local seafood)
slots.description: Unhurried dinner; pick a place with strong seafood rotation.

slots.name: Breakfast
slots.description: Coffee + breakfast near the harbor.

slots.name: Market + village food crawl (Sóller area)
slots.description: Morning market browsing + local bites. Keep it flexible; stop when something looks best.
slots.notes: Bring water; midday heat—choose shaded spots.

slots.name: Lunch (tapas + local wine)
slots.description: Order a mix of local dishes + a glass of red/rosé.

slots.name: Slow sea time + gelato/ice cream
slots.description: Swim if you feel like it; otherwise just lounge + dessert.

slots.name: Dinner (creative Mallorcan tasting / seafood)
slots.description: High-quality dinner; reserve.

slots.name: Breakfast
slots.description: Light breakfast; plan towels + water.

slots.name: Hidden beach cove #3 (long lounge)
slots.description: Pick a calmer cove; swim in the morning light; rest on shore benches.

slots.name: Lunch (grilled fish / ensalada)
slots.description: Simple, fresh lunch after beach time.

slots.name: Hotel downtime + siesta
slots.description: Reset for evening plans.

slots.name: Dinner (local roast + dessert)
slots.description: Another classic Mallorcan dinner—go for seasonal specials.

slots.name: Breakfast
slots.description: Slow start.

slots.name: Free sea day: swim + lounge (choose 2 swimming stops)
slots.description: Two relaxed swims separated by a break; keep it effortless.
slots.location: Port de Sóller bay / nearby coves

slots.name: Long lunch (local wine + fideuà/paella)
slots.description: One big meal; then rest.

slots.name: Late afternoon: sunset lookout OR shaded promenade
slots.description: Choose a short viewpoint if energy allows; otherwise promenade.

slots.name: Dinner (lighter seafood + dessert)
slots.description: Keep it lighter after the long lunch.

slots.name: Breakfast
slots.description: Pack gradually; keep breakfast easy.

slots.name: Final hidden beach + swim
slots.description: One last calm cove. Spend more time than you think you should.

slots.name: Lunch (last local meal)
slots.description: Order something you loved earlier as a “send-off”.

slots.name: Check-out + luggage storage (if needed)
slots.description: Check-out, use hotel storage, and stay near the harbor.

slots.name: Evening: harbor stroll + farewell dinner
slots.description: Last walk; cool down and take photos.

slots.name: Farewell dinner (wine + Mallorcan specialties)
slots.description: Dinner before departure next day or late checkout plan.

slots.name: Departure (Port de Sóller → Palma airport) + flight
slots.description: Assumes early flight next day; adjust if your return flight differs.
